name: Local moving pricing
answer: Local moving pricing in Metro Vancouver depends on crew size, time required, access, stairs or elevator bookings, packing needs, travel time, and specialty items. Purely Canadian Movers provides a written estimate before booking so customers can understand the expected cost before moving day.
priceModel: Quoted based on move details. Local moves commonly use crew size and time as major pricing drivers.

name: Long-distance moving pricing
answer: Long-distance moving costs in Canada depend on shipment weight or volume, route distance, pickup and delivery access, timing, packing, storage, specialty handling, and valuation coverage. A written estimate is the right way to confirm the final cost.
priceModel: Quoted based on inventory, route, timing, and service requirements.

name: Packing service pricing
answer: Packing service pricing depends on the number of rooms, box count, fragile items, packing materials, and whether the customer needs full packing, partial packing, or unpacking help.
priceModel: Quoted based on packing scope and material needs.

name: Storage pricing
answer: Storage pricing depends on the volume of goods, storage duration, pickup and delivery requirements, and whether storage is paired with a local or long-distance move.
priceModel: Quoted based on volume, duration, and handling requirements.
